requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz / 220-380 V Grid and China GB/T 18487 Evidence

summary.en: Azerbaijan uses a CIS-standard 50 Hz power system at 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase. Chinese EV chargers designed for China's 50 Hz grid are frequency-compatible at a basic level, but the remaining issues include site voltage tolerance, phase configuration, earthing system type (TN-C-S is common in post-Soviet networks), power quality, thermal and cold-weather performance, surge environment, residual-current protection, and Azerishig or Azerenerji distribution-grid technical conditions for the specific installation site.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆采用CIS标准50Hz电力系统，单相220V、三相380V。面向中国50Hz电网设计的电动汽车充电设备在基础频率上兼容，但剩余问题包括站点电压容差、相数配置、接地系统类型（后苏联网络常见TN-C-S）、电能质量、热性能和寒冷天气性能、浪涌环境、剩余电流保护，以及特定安装站点的Azerishig或Azerenerji配电网技术条件。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜疆採用CIS標準50Hz電力系統，單相220V、三相380V。面向中國50Hz電網設計的電動汽車充電設備在基礎頻率上相容，但剩餘問題包括站點電壓容差、相數配置、接地系統類型（後蘇聯網路常見TN-C-S）、電能品質、熱性能和寒冷天氣性能、浪湧環境、剩餘電流保護，以及特定安裝站點的Azerishig或Azerenerji配電網技術條件。

standards_or_laws: Azerbaijan electricity supply and grid technical conditions (Azerishig / Azerenerji)
IEC 61851-1 general EV charging system requirements
Applicable AZS / GOST electrical installation and power-quality requirements
Project-specific earthing, protection, and commissioning specifications

summary.en: China GB/T 18487.1-2023 evidence typically addresses 50 Hz charger control and protection behavior. GB/T 20234 connector evidence and GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication evidence may also be in the dossier, but they must be mapped to Azerbaijan site conditions, earthing system, and any IEC 61851 requirements specified by the buyer or grid operator.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 18487.1-2023证据通常涵盖50Hz充电控制和保护行为。资料包中可能还包括GB/T 20234连接器证据和GB/T 27930-2023直流通信证据，但必须将其映射到阿塞拜疆站点条件、接地系统以及买方或电网运营商指定的IEC 61851要求。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 18487.1-2023證據通常涵蓋50Hz充電控制和保護行為。資料包中可能還包括GB/T 20234連接器證據和GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊證據，但必須將其映射到亞塞拜疆站點條件、接地系統以及買方或電網營運商指定的IEC 61851要求。

standards_or_laws: China charger environmental and power-quality test reports

gap.en: Document 50 Hz and 220/380 V nameplate suitability, accepted input-voltage range, three-phase and single-phase variants, neutral and earthing assumptions for TN-C-S networks, derating curves, IP / IK ratings, surge and overvoltage protection, residual-current protection type, and any cold-climate startup or heater requirements for the Azerbaijan installation environment.
gap.zh: 应记录50Hz和220/380V铭牌适用性、允许输入电压范围、三相和单相变体、TN-C-S网络的中性线和接地假设、降额曲线、IP/IK等级、浪涌和过电压保护、剩余电流保护类型，以及阿塞拜疆安装环境的低温启动或加热要求。
gap.zht: 應記錄50Hz和220/380V銘牌適用性、允許輸入電壓範圍、三相和單相變體、TN-C-S網路的中性線和接地假設、降額曲線、IP/IK等級、浪湧和過電壓保護、剩餘電流保護類型，以及亞塞拜疆安裝環境的低溫啟動或加熱要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by Azerishig or Azerenerji site technical conditions, electrical installation rules, or project specification; otherwise a core technical acceptance check for market entry
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese product safety, GB/T charger scope, and customer requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Shared 50 Hz frequency reduces one compatibility risk, but it does not close Azerbaijan voltage, earthing, power-quality, environmental, connector, or grid-approval gaps.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 同为50Hz可降低一个兼容性风险，但不能覆盖阿塞拜疆电压、接地、电能质量、环境、连接器或电网批准差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 同為50Hz可降低一個相容性風險，但不能覆蓋亞塞拜疆電壓、接地、電能品質、環境、連接器或電網批准差距。
